scenario.name: Long Response
scenario.persona: Jacky Espino, 23 years old. Patient calls to schedule an appointment but before anything rambles about her week while randomly including her symptoms and name.
scenario.goal: Schedule an appointment on a Thursday
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly extract relevant information from long responses

history.content: this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes, but  thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create the demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.

Oh, hey! It's Jacky Espino. You know, this week has been utterly crazy. Just the other day, my knee started acting up as I was heading to the grocery store, and then my cat... Oh, sorry, yeah, it's Jacky Espino.
I can help with that first. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started with scheduling your appointment.
Oh, no, I don't need a demo patient profile, just trying to get an appointment. My knee's been bothering me, and I figured it's time to get it checked out. Did I mention my name's Jacky Espino?
I can help you set up an appointment, but I'll need to create a demo patient profile for you first met. I have your first and last name.

Okay, sure, let's get that profile set up. My knee's really been giving me a hard time, especially after this long week. Did I mention I had to chase my cat all over the house yesterday? What do you need next?
Thanks for sharing that to set up your profile. Could you please tell me your first and last name?
Oh, sorry if I wasn't clear! It's Jacky Espino. Yeah, definitely felt that knee pain more after all that running around.
Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July. 4th 2000 for demo purposes. How may I help you today?
Great, thanks for setting that up! I need to schedule an appointment. Do you have anything available on a Thursday? My knee's been a constant bother lately.
Thanks, Jackie. Is this appointment for a general office? Visit a follow-up, or do you have a specific concern about your need like to address?
It's more of a specific concern. My knee's been really bothering me, especially after all the running around I've been doing this week. I'd like to have it checked out.
Is this a new urgent issue with your knee that needs prompt attention? Or is it something ongoing that you want checked out?
It's been ongoing for a bit, but it's gotten worse this week. Definitely would like to get it checked out soon.
Since your knee pain has been ongoing, but is now getting worse. Would you like to book an acute visit for Urgent concerns? Or do you prefer a general office? Visit to discuss your symptoms.
I think an acute visit would be best, just to make sure everything's okay. Do you have any openings on a Thursday?
Do you have a provider you prefer to see? Or are you open to any available provider?
I'm open to any available provider. Just want to make sure I can get in on a Thursday.
Do you prefer morning or afternoon appointments on Thursdays?
Afternoon would be perfect.

It looks like you already have an acute. Visit booked for your knee. If you want to reschedule or cancel that appointment I can help. Would you like to make a change or do you need to speak with someone from our team?
Oh, I must have forgotten about that! If it's already scheduled, that's great. No changes needed. Thanks so much for your help!
No problem. Would you like to reschedule cancel, or keep your current appointment?
I'd like to keep my current appointment, thank you!
You're all set. Jackie. If you need anything else before your appointment just let me know. Take care.
Great, thanks a lot! I'll see you at the appointment. Take care!
